summary: Section Lock Bug Fix Testing - All bugs verified and fixed. Backend SDV lock enforcement was broken (querying non-existent is_active field) - fixed. Frontend SectionLockedOverlay correctly hides content when locked (not blurred). Unlock flow works correctly. OnboardingWizard caches dismissed state in localStorage to prevent dashboard layout shift.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SDV lock check was querying for 'is_active: True' in MongoDB but that field doesn't exist in DB - it's a computed field. Fixed to check password_enabled OR voice_enabled OR security_question_enabled

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix applied: /app/backend/routes/documents.py - changed SDV lock query from {is_active: True} to checking actual DB fields (password_enabled, voice_enabled, security_question_enabled)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All section lock overlays work correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Section lock system tested. SDV/MM/IAC/BM/DTS/EGA all properly hide content when locked. Backend download endpoint now correctly enforces SDV lock. OnboardingWizard uses localStorage to cache dismissed state preventing layout shift. Test password for locks: TestLock123!

tested_features.section_lock_sdv_vault: PASS - Lock overlay shows, content hidden, unlock modal works
tested_features.section_lock_mm_messages: PASS - Lock overlay shows when MM locked
tested_features.section_lock_iac_checklist: PASS - Lock overlay shows when IAC locked
tested_features.backend_download_403: PASS - Returns 403 when SDV lock active (after fix)
tested_features.unlock_flow: PASS - Password modal appears, verify button unlocks section
tested_features.pages_without_lock: PASS - All lockable pages render correctly when not locked
tested_features.onboarding_wizard_localStorage: PASS - Dismissed state cached in localStorage
